demoPage.title: Zero Integration Friction. Maximum Financial Upside.
demoPage.description: Speed and seamless experience are critical for neobanks. Declarion integrates directly into your platform, letting your business customers unlock hidden VAT refunds effortlessly.
demoPage.feature1Description: We handle everything from claim filing to fund disbursement.
demoPage.feature2Description: Earn commission on every successful VAT refund.
demoPage.feature3Description: Offer a unique service that differentiates your platform.
demoPage.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we will be in touch within 24 hours.
